name: The Ryuo's Work is Never Done!
original_name: りゅうおうのおしごと！
overview: The story is about a teenage boy who happens to be a shougi master. One day, a nine-year-old girl turns up at his house, requesting to be taken as his disciple. From there, all kinds of wacky hijinks ensue.

trailers.title: The Ryuo's Work is Never Done! - Official Preview
